name: Security Scanner
description: Scans project for hardcoded secrets, insecure dependencies, and common security anti-patterns using LLM-assisted review.

checks.pass: ⚠️  Found 'API_KEY' string in source — verify no secrets are committed
checks.fail: ✅ No API_KEY literals found in source

checks.pass: ✅ .gitignore present — secrets unlikely to be committed
checks.fail: 🔴 No .gitignore — secrets and .env files may be tracked
failRecommendations: Add .gitignore immediately and audit git history for committed secrets

checks.prompt:
Perform a security review of the TypeScript source listed below. Focus on:
1. Hardcoded credentials or tokens
2. Unsafe shell command construction (command injection)
3. Path traversal vulnerabilities
4. Unsafe JSON.parse / eval usage
5. Missing input validation on user-supplied data
6. Secrets in environment variable names logged to console

Source directory listing:
{content}

Respond with a bullet list. Prefix critical issues with CRITICAL:, warnings with WARN:.

checks.fail: ⚠️  npm audit found high or critical vulnerabilities
failRecommendations: Run 'npm audit fix' or update affected packages
